sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Try clicking on black bar at rows 20-23, cols 10-13 to push charcoal
action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 21, 'col': 11}])
print(f"After click: level_completed={last_action_result.get('level_completed')}")

# Check charcoal position
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'c':
        print(f"Charcoal at: {n['boundary']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
